title: oenanthe globulosa var. olbiensis
intro: Oenanthe globulosa var. olbiensis, also known as water dropwort, is a variety of water dropwort, a plant species in the carrot family (Apiaceae). It is native to certain regions of Europe and has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Oenanthe globulosa var. olbiensis include relief from respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and relieve menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
